name: clickup-common-errors
description: Diagnose and fix ClickUp API v2 errors by HTTP status and error code. Use when encountering ClickUp API errors, debugging failed requests, or troubleshooting OAUTH_* error codes, 401s, 429s, and 500s. Trigger: "clickup error", "fix clickup", "clickup not working", "clickup 401", "clickup 429", "OAUTH error", "debug clickup API".
